name: Theme Lab Drawer
description: Right-side drawer for previewing theme color palettes. Shows scrollable theme cards with color swatch strips, names, and descriptions. Clicking a card injects the theme's tokens as CSS custom property overrides for live preview.

default.description: Full drawer with scrollable theme cards, swatch strips, and live preview injection

slots.scrim: Semi-transparent overlay behind drawer, closes on click
slots.header: Title 'Color Preview', close button, subtitle disclaimer that preview is approximate
slots.theme-list: Scrollable list of theme cards, each with color swatch strip, name, and description
slots.footer: Reset button to restore original theme tokens

slots.scrim: Semi-transparent overlay behind drawer, closes on click
slots.header: Title 'Color Preview', close button, subtitle disclaimer
slots.theme-list: Scrollable list of theme cards with swatch strips
slots.footer: Reset button to restore original theme

visual_brief: 380px wide right-side drawer spanning full viewport height. Uses fixed neutral colors (not token-dependent) so it remains readable while theme tokens are being swapped. The scrim is a semi-transparent dark overlay covering the rest of the viewport. Header contains 'Color Preview' title, a close icon button, and a subtle disclaimer that preview is approximate. The theme-list slot scrolls vertically, showing cards for each available theme. Each theme card displays a horizontal strip of 5-6 color circles (the theme's key palette colors), the theme name in bold, and a short description. The active/selected card has an accent-colored border and a checkmark badge. Footer contains a single 'Reset' button to clear the preview override.

responsive.mobile: Hidden entirely in v1 — desktop-only feature. Theme preview trigger button also hidden on mobile.
responsive.tablet: Drawer renders at 380px width. Scrim covers remaining viewport.
responsive.desktop: Drawer renders at 380px width. Scrim covers remaining viewport. Comfortable padding and spacing for theme cards.

accessibility.focus_trap: Focus is trapped within drawer when open. Tab cycles through close button, theme cards, and reset button.
accessibility.keyboard: Escape key closes the drawer. Arrow keys navigate theme cards. Enter selects a theme.
accessibility.announcements: Theme name is announced via aria-live region on selection. Drawer open/close state announced.
